hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TYPE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .notification_type); [ "$TYPE" = "auth_success" ] && exit 0; MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".message // empty"); WIN=$(tmux display-message -t "$TMUX_PANE" -p "#I" 2>/dev/null); notify-macos "Claude Code" "$MSG" "tmux select-window -t $WIN"'
